metadata.title: Blog — Gazetta
metadata.description: News, tutorials, and updates from the Gazetta team.

content.body:
We're excited to introduce Gazetta — a stateless CMS that rethinks how websites are built and published.

Traditional CMSes couple content authoring with a database that must be maintained, backed up, and deployed. Gazetta takes a different approach: the CMS stores nothing. All content lives in targets — S3, Azure Blob, or plain files on disk.

Pages are composed from reusable components at serve time. Update a shared header fragment once, and every page reflects it instantly — no rebuild needed.

Templates are pure functions that return HTML, CSS, and JS. Use any framework — React, Svelte, Vue, or plain TypeScript. The template contract is the boundary.

Gazetta is open source under the MIT license. We'd love your feedback and contributions.

View on GitHub →
